todos.content: Run SQL analysis on Chinook DB: compute monthly revenue by genre and customer country; identify top 5 revenue-generating genres (with ties); for each top genre list top 5 customers by total revenue; detect months with unusual month-over-month spikes or declines (flag >=50% change). Produce SQL script and result tables and a short business analysis saved under /_outputs/chinook_task_output/.
Explore DB schema (list tables and inspect Invoice, InvoiceLine, Track, Genre, Customer)
Run SQL queries to produce CSV outputs (genre-month-country revenue, top genres, top customers per top genres, spikes/declines)
Write analysis.md summarizing findings and recommendations
Save queries.sql and CSVs under /_outputs/chinook_task_output/ and finalize outputs

Run SQL analysis on Chinook DB: compute monthly revenue by genre and customer country; identify top 5 revenue-generating genres (with ties); for each top genre list top 5 customers by total revenue; detect months with unusual month-over-month spikes or declines (flag >=50% change). Produce SQL script and result tables and a short business analysis saved under /_outputs/chinook_task_output/.
Render final deliverables to user (show files under /_outputs/chinook_task_output).
